game.shooter.controls: [←]/[→] Move [Z] Switch Fire Mode [Space] Fire [X] Use Nuke [S] Save [R] Restart [Q]/[ESC] Exit
game.shooter.description: Control your fighter, move and fire bullets to shoot down enemy planes appearing on screen.
game.shooter.details:
f%Destroy as many enemies as possible, increase your score, and defeat bosses {tc:yellow}before your lives run out{tc:clear}.

{tc:yellow}Player Items:{tc:clear}
{tc:yellow}A{tc:clear} Player-controlled plane, has ten lives.
{tc:green}^{tc:clear} Normal bullet.
{tc:green}:{tc:clear} Double shot, fires two normal bullets.
{tc:green}|{tc:clear} Laser, can penetrate enemies.
{tc:green}.{tc:clear} Burst bullet, deals double damage.
{tc:green}!{tc:clear} Missile, deals high damage and tracks enemies, can be shot down by enemy bullets.

{tc:yellow}Enemy Items:{tc:clear}
{tc:rgb(255,170,170)}V{tc:clear} Normal plane.
{tc:rgb(255,170,170)}Y{tc:clear} Fast plane.
{tc:rgb(255,170,170)}W{tc:clear} Armored plane.
{tc:rgb(255,170,170)}U{tc:clear} Armed plane.
{tc:magenta}v{tc:clear} Normal bullet.
{tc:magenta}.{tc:clear} Burst bullet, deals double damage.
{tc:magenta}u{tc:clear} Missile, deals high damage and tracks, can be shot down by player bullets.
{tc:rgb(255,170,170)}███{tc:clear} BOSS body.
{tc:rgb(255,170,170)} █{tc:clear}

{tc:yellow}Power-ups:{tc:clear}
{tc:rgb(170,255,170)}@{tc:clear} Speed Booster Increases fire rate.
{tc:rgb(170,255,170)}%{tc:clear} Laser Allows firing lasers.
{tc:rgb(170,255,170)}${tc:clear} Double Shot Allows firing double shots.
{tc:rgb(170,255,170)}#{tc:clear} Burst Shot Allows firing burst bullets.
{tc:rgb(170,255,170)}&{tc:clear} Missile Launcher Allows firing missiles.
{tc:rgb(120,255,255)}*{tc:clear} Shield Temporary invincibility.
{tc:rgb(120,255,255)}~{tc:clear} Health Restores lost life.
{tc:rgb(120,255,255)}o{tc:clear} Coin Bonus score.
{tc:rgb(120,255,255)}c{tc:clear} Magnet Attracts items to the player.
{tc:rgb(120,255,255)}+{tc:clear} Bullet Speed Increases bullet speed.
{tc:rgb(120,255,255)}G{tc:clear} Nuke Clears the screen or deals fixed damage to boss, player also loses life. Can store up to three.

{tc:yellow}Game Mechanics:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}Stage Progression:{tc:clear} Higher stages increase enemy stats and density; player bullet damage also scales.
{tc:light_cyan}Boss Stage:{tc:clear} Occurs at certain score intervals.
{tc:light_cyan}Boss Modes:{tc:clear}
 - Offensive: Fires rhythmically at the player's position.
 - Predictive: Predicts where the player might move.
 - Evasive: Dodges player attacks.
 - Summon: Summons minor enemies to disrupt the fight.
 - Pursuit: Fires a continuous barrage of bullets.

{tc:yellow}Controls:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}[←]/[→]{tc:clear} Move
{tc:light_cyan}[Z]{tc:clear} Switch fire mode
{tc:light_cyan}[Space]{tc:clear} Fire (manual mode)
{tc:light_cyan}[X]{tc:clear} Use nuke
{tc:light_cyan}[S]{tc:clear} Save
{tc:light_cyan}[R]{tc:clear} Restart
{tc:light_cyan}[Q]/[ESC]{tc:clear} Exit
game.shooter.name: Air Shooter
